title: Virus Isolation and Sequencing
author: Min Chen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jh2cj8e

steps.title: After the cells were inoculated with...
steps.instruction: After the cells were inoculated with virally contaminated samples, they were cultured at 37°C and observed for three passages.
3.When the cytopathic effect (CPE) affected 75–100% of the cell monolayer, the virus was harvested. It needed to pass three generation when no CPE was observed in the initial cell culture.

steps.title: Collected viral particles were analyzed using...
steps.instruction: Collected viral particles were analyzed using RT-PCR and the complete VP1 gene sequences from the EV71 and CA16 isolates were amplified.

steps.title: The amplified products were sent to Sangon Biotech Co
steps.instruction: The amplified products were sent to Sangon Biotech Co., Ltd (Shanghai, China) for DNA Sanger sequencing.

steps.title: Viruses were isolated from cultured rhabdomyosarcoma...
steps.instruction: Viruses were isolated from cultured rhabdomyosarcoma (RD) cells and human epidermoid cancer cells (Hep-2) cells.
